task_completion.description: Check if the agent opened and read the enrollment brief document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/occ_health_enrollment_brief.txt'.

task_completion.description: Check if the agent registered the three specified employees in the WGER system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WGER user management or admin interface showing the newly created users: 'dwilliams_meridian', 'rparker_meridian', and 'lchavez_meridian'.

task_completion.description: Check if the agent created the specified workout routine and its training days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WGER routine page displaying the routine 'Meridian Ergonomic Wellness Circuit' and its training days ('Cardio and Core Activation', 'Upper Body Resistance', 'Lower Body Mobility and Strength').

task_completion.description: Check if the agent created the nutrition plan with the correct macro goals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WGER nutrition plan page showing 'Meridian Metabolic Risk Reduction Plan' with macro goals set to 2200 kcal energy, 110g protein, 270g carbs, and 62g fat.

task_completion.description: Check if the agent added the five specified meals to the nutrition plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WGER nutrition plan details showing the meals: 'Whole-Grain Breakfast', 'Mid-Morning Snack', 'Balanced Lunch', 'Pre-Workout Snack', and 'Heart-Healthy Dinner'.

task_completion.description: Check if the agent established the specified body composition measurement categories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WGER measurement categories page showing 'Waist Circumference' (with unit 'cm') and 'Resting Heart Rate' (with unit 'bpm').

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the web browser to interact with the WGER application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the WGER web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands like curl or python scripts to interact with the API.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent entered data into the web forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing into form fields or clicking buttons in the WGER interface, rather than just displaying a final success message or modifying the DOM directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'sqlite3' or direct SQL queries being executed to insert the data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Users: dwilliams_meridian (d.williams@meridian-ind.com), rparker_meridian (r.parker@meridian-ind.com), lchavez_meridian (l.chavez@meridian-ind.com). Expected Routine Name: Meridian Ergonomic Wellness Circuit. Expected Routine Description: 12-week cardiovascular risk reduction program for sedentary manufacturing workers. Expected Training Days: Cardio and Core Activation (Day 1), Upper Body Resistance (Day 3), Lower Body Mobility and Strength (Day 5). Expected Nutrition Plan: Meridian Metabolic Risk Reduction Plan. Expected Macro Goals: Energy 2200 kcal, Protein 110g, Carbs 270g, Fat 62g. Expected Meals: Whole-Grain Breakfast, Mid-Morning Snack, Balanced Lunch, Pre-Workout Snack, Heart-Healthy Dinner. Expected Measurement Categories: Waist Circumference (cm), Resting Heart Rate (bpm).
